## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss website migration issues, SEO performance, and outbound marketing campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Website migration from Webflow to Sanity experiencing issues with some blog posts not transferring correctly or creating 404 errors](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [SEO performance showing positive trends with clicks increasing from \~20 to \~50 daily over the past week](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Outbound email campaigns performing well with 45-70% open rates, but experiencing temporary high bounce rates due to infrastructure changes](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [New targeted campaigns being prepared for podcast hosts and users of specific wealth management tools](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)

## Topics

### Website Migration Issues

  - [Some blog posts not transferring from Webflow to Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Issues include 404 errors and missing content on live pages](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Manual review and content transfer needed for affected pages](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Prateek to prioritize fixing high-traffic pages first](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Mark to connect Prateek with Julie from Web Stacks for additional support](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Significant increase in daily clicks (from \~20 to \~50-56) and impressions (from \~1000 to \~3500) over the past few days](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Weekly clicks increased from 130 to 230](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Growth seen across multiple pages, not just concentrated on one article](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Some new pages getting initial clicks, possibly due to internal testing](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Competitor Analysis for Content Strategy

  - [Planning AI notetaker comparison campaign](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Compiled list of competitors based on organic and brand traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [Mark suggested adding FinMate AI to the list](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Prateek to share final list for approval before starting articles](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)

### Outbound Email Campaigns

  - [Two financial advisor campaigns live:](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
    1.  Older campaign: 44.9% open rate, 16.22% positive reply rate
    2.  Newer campaign: \~70% open rate, higher click rate, 7 positive replies so far
  - [Targeting adjusted to focus on US and EU prospects](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Temporary high bounce rates due to infrastructure changes, expected to improve within a week](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - Warm-up emails on <mark@knap.ai> to be discontinued

### New Campaign Development

  - [Podcast host campaign:](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [List of \~400 podcast hosts compiled with details on their roles and conversation topics](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
      - [Next steps include extracting contact information and crafting targeted emails](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Retail wealth box campaign:](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
      - [In list segmentation stage](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
      - [Sourcing users of specific tools (e.g., Redtail, Wealthbox) using Apollo and other methods](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to manually review and fix high-priority blog posts affected by migration issues](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Pierre to finalize podcast host list and craft targeted email campaign](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Pierre to continue sourcing users for retail wealth box campaign and develop email copy](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Mark to review and approve final list of competitors for AI notetaker comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Team to monitor SEO performance and maintain positive growth trends](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Address high bounce rates in email campaigns by diversifying infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/ERNWeSoyJhLxnZzqzry9-yh7YMYWCpUv?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
